Video.summary: Kick off the course by getting to know Cimon, a Greek politician and military general, who helped transform Athens into a world power.
Video.grandparentTitle: Unsung Heroes of the Ancient World
Video.title: Cimon of Athens: From Glory to Disgrace

Image.alt: Cimon of Athens: From Glory to Disgrace
Cimon of Athens: From Glory to Disgrace
Cimon of Athens: From Glory to Disgrace

Video.summary: Survey the tremendous military, economic, and material successes that transformed Samos from a sleepy island to a major regional power under his leadership.
Video.grandparentTitle: Unsung Heroes of the Ancient World
Video.title: Polycrates of Samos: The Tale of a Tyrant

Image.alt: Polycrates of Samos: The Tale of a Tyrant
Polycrates of Samos: The Tale of a Tyrant
Polycrates of Samos: The Tale of a Tyrant

Video.summary: See how Epaminondas organized a potent fighting force in his home region to throw off the yoke of Spartan oppression.
Video.grandparentTitle: Unsung Heroes of the Ancient World
Video.title: Epanimondas of Thebes: Slayer of the Spartans

Image.alt: Epanimondas of Thebes: Slayer of the Spartans
Epanimondas of Thebes: Slayer of the Spartans
Epanimondas of Thebes: Slayer of the Spartans

Video.summary: Turn your attention to two obscure Alexandrian inventors: Ctesibius and Hero.
Video.grandparentTitle: Unsung Heroes of the Ancient World
Video.title: Ctesibius and Hero: Alexandrian Inventors

Video.summary: Explore the Egyptian pharaoh Ramesses II's all-but-disastrous campaign against the Hittites.
Video.grandparentTitle: Living History: Experiencing Great Events of the Ancient and Medieval Worlds
Video.title: Ramesses II: Heartbeat of History

Video.summary: Professor Garland takes you into the Battle of Marathon.
Video.grandparentTitle: Living History: Experiencing Great Events of the Ancient and Medieval Worlds
Video.title: Marathon: The Persians Have Landed!

Video.summary: At the Theater of Dionysis, view one of the most astounding performances in history.
Video.grandparentTitle: Living History: Experiencing Great Events of the Ancient and Medieval Worlds
Video.title: Oresteia: Judgment at the Dionysia

Video.summary: Here, delve into the time of Pericles and the Peloponnesian War.
Video.grandparentTitle: Living History: Experiencing Great Events of the Ancient and Medieval Worlds
Video.title: Attack on Attica: Pericles's Gamble

Video.summary: In this episode, understand why ancient Egypt had to invent some form of writing.
Video.grandparentTitle: Decoding the Secrets of Egyptian Hieroglyphs
Video.title: Why Egypt Needed Hieroglyphs

Video.summary: Professor Brier shows you how to write each hieroglyph and how to position them.
Video.grandparentTitle: Decoding the Secrets of Egyptian Hieroglyphs
Video.title: The Ancient Egyptian Alphabet

Video.summary: How is it possible for a language used by the world's greatest civilization to become lost?
Video.grandparentTitle: Decoding the Secrets of Egyptian Hieroglyphs
Video.title: How a Language Becomes Lost

Video.summary: Explore how hieroglyphs, and the ability to read them, was rediscovered during Napoleon's invasion of Egypt.
Video.grandparentTitle: Decoding the Secrets of Egyptian Hieroglyphs
Video.title: Napoleon in Egypt

Video.summary: Consider the nature of Athenian democracy and how it functioned in practice.
Video.grandparentTitle: Athenian Democracy: An Experiment for the Ages
Video.title: Why Athenian Democracy Matters

Video.summary: Delve into Homer's epics to examine several early examples of democratic assembly.
Video.grandparentTitle: Athenian Democracy: An Experiment for the Ages
Video.title: The Origins of Greek Democracy

Video.summary: Witness the great crisis that led to Solon's reforms and set Athenian democracy on its course.
Video.grandparentTitle: Athenian Democracy: An Experiment for the Ages
Video.title: Solon: The Father of Democracy?

Video.summary: Learn how Cleisthenes undermined the old aristocratic system and carried the democratic experiment forward.
Video.grandparentTitle: Athenian Democracy: An Experiment for the Ages
Video.title: Cleisthenes the Innovator

Video.summary: The series begins with a brief overview of Tocqueville's masterwork.
Video.grandparentTitle: Tocqueville and the American Experiment
Video.title: An Overview of Democracy in America

Image.alt: An Overview of Democracy in America
An Overview of Democracy in America
An Overview of Democracy in America

Video.summary: Meet the young French nobleman whose most famous book was only one achievement in a life marked by several.
Video.grandparentTitle: Tocqueville and the American Experiment
Video.title: Alexis de Tocqueville'A Brief Biography

Video.summary: Tocqueville's letters and journals allow us to get an excellent feel for his experiences in America.
Video.grandparentTitle: Tocqueville and the American Experiment
Video.title: The Journey to America

Video.summary: Consider the implications of what Tocqueville introduces in Democracy in America's first paragraph.
Video.grandparentTitle: Tocqueville and the American Experiment
Video.title: Equality of Conditions and Freedom

Video.summary: Take account of changes unleashed by the devastation of the Civil War.
Video.grandparentTitle: America in the Gilded Age and Progressive Era
Video.title: 1865: "Bind Up the Nation's Wounds"

Video.summary: Learn about policies enacted to safeguard citizens and former slaves.
Video.grandparentTitle: America in the Gilded Age and Progressive Era
Video.title: The Reconstruction Revolution

Video.summary: Examine the complex story of the conquest of the American West.
Video.grandparentTitle: America in the Gilded Age and Progressive Era
Video.title: Buffalo Bill Cody and the Myth of the West

Image.alt: Buffalo Bill Cody and the Myth of the West
Buffalo Bill Cody and the Myth of the West
Buffalo Bill Cody and the Myth of the West

Video.summary: Learn how the US became the world\'s greatest industrial power.
Video.grandparentTitle: America in the Gilded Age and Progressive Era
Video.title: Smokestack Nation: The Industrial Titans

Video.summary: Take a virtual walk from the Washington Monument to the US Capitol to explore the history of Earth.
Video.grandparentTitle: Introduction to Paleontology
Video.title: History on a Geological Scale

Video.summary: Learn about the fascinating individuals and showmen whose curiosity led to the development of paleontology.
Video.grandparentTitle: Introduction to Paleontology
Video.title: Life Cast in Ancient Stone

Video.summary: Learn how technology is used to examine fossils from the size of pollen to the bones of Tyrannosaurus rex.
Video.grandparentTitle: Introduction to Paleontology
Video.title: Tools of the Paleontological Trade

Video.summary: Learn how trace fossils help us understand the early evolution and the diversification of animal life.
Video.grandparentTitle: Introduction to Paleontology
Video.title: How Do You Fossilize Behavior?

Video.summary: Explore the Black Death's pathology and symptoms, and dive briefly into Chaucer's childhood
Video.grandparentTitle: After the Plague
Video.title: Resilience: Rethinking the Black Death

Video.summary: Investigate the public health consequences of globalization in the medieval period.
Video.grandparentTitle: After the Plague
Video.title: Medieval Globalization and the Black Death

Image.alt: Medieval Globalization and the Black Death
Medieval Globalization and the Black Death
Medieval Globalization and the Black Death

Video.summary: What did the plague's path on the continent look like? How quickly or slowly did it spread?
Video.grandparentTitle: After the Plague
Video.title: Death Ships: The Spread of Plague in Europe

Image.alt: Death Ships: The Spread of Plague in Europe
Death Ships: The Spread of Plague in Europe
Death Ships: The Spread of Plague in Europe

Video.summary: Investigate the bubonic plague's effect on children and how whole towns cared for orphans.
Video.grandparentTitle: After the Plague
Video.title: Children, Plague, and Grief
